ComponentDescription: ROS2 camera_node stack — publishes /camera/image_raw for detr_node

Run.Script: docker run --rm --name robops-ros2stack --network host --device /dev/video0:/dev/video0 -e ROBOT_ID={configuration:/robotId} -e CAMERA_DEVICE=0 -e CAMERA_FPS=5 -e MONGO_URI={secrets:robops/mongo_uri} 688567275774.dkr.ecr.eu-central-1.amazonaws.com/robops/ros2-stack:PLACEHOLDER_DATASET_VERSION
